## Risk Assessment Matrix

| Risk Level | Likelihood | Impact | Business Priority | Timeline |
|------------|------------|---------|------------------|----------|
| Critical   | High       | High    | Immediate        | 0-7 days |
| High       | High       | Medium  | Urgent           | 30 days  |
| Medium     | Medium     | Medium  | Planned          | 90 days  |
| Low        | Low        | Low     | Backlog          | Next cycle |
